[(array([202, 498, 410, 521, 363, 147, 582, 558, 135, 408,  76, 119, 579,

         400, 351,  26, 114, 399,  63, 563, 128, 581, 592, 480, 443, 411,

 (array([638, 276,  47, 142, 455,   4, 540, 637, 233, 293, 532, 331, 263,
         321, 500, 604, 633,  76, 246, 439,  87, 445, 218, 275, 380, 550,

         226,  46, 623, 337, 100, 315, 601, 626, 561, 427, 526,  69,  96,
         393, 261, 494, 539, 513, 470, 352, 503, 257, 127, 536, 549, 329,
         202, 350, 340, 189, 308, 591, 158, 579, 514, 123,  23, 251, 534,
         191, 457,  92, 147, 429,  55, 412, 597, 228, 330, 209, 347, 371,
         618,  22, 106, 361, 318, 262, 266,  28, 344, 467, 631, 430, 488,
         313, 112, 524, 566, 162, 273, 169, 154, 232, 319, 489, 577, 201,
         596, 426,  16, 173, 599, 521,  64, 139,  12,  85, 197, 545, 302,
         237, 133, 157,  31,  41, 212, 215,  14, 408, 448, 108, 537, 442,
         454, 195, 620, 622, 166, 311, 516,  78, 295, 617,  26, 589, 341,
         480,  54, 360, 231, 603, 548, 482, 384, 573, 172, 279, 178,  51,
          53,  74, 634,  34,  39, 485, 406, 211, 394, 436, 441, 424, 531,
         613, 356,  77, 221, 280, 580, 163, 564, 572,  11,  30, 542, 402,
         583, 322, 491,  97,  19, 144,  29, 324, 326, 165,  50, 238, 155,
         639, 258, 208, 256,   6, 463, 116, 584, 265, 385, 567, 284,  63,
         375, 418, 409, 217, 438, 138, 170,  94, 425, 240, 543, 391, 499,
         510, 145, 369, 619, 230, 461, 271, 472,  93, 575, 137, 307, 420,
         181, 533, 220, 288, 523,  27, 235, 495,  98, 254, 386, 332, 188,
         105, 114, 286,  13, 333, 346, 187, 234, 578, 282, 462, 296, 156,
         473, 490, 498, 444, 546, 565, 214, 129, 487,  33,  15, 443, 554,

         483, 621, 497, 268, 404, 348,  88, 367,   9, 229, 250, 538, 199,
